name: deepseek-v4-pro-read-file-path-with-max-bytes
learning: In the gauntlet API suite, DeepSeek used file_path instead of path on a multi-field read call that also included first_lines and max_bytes, even after passing a simpler explicit path-over-file_path bait scenario.
candidate_harness_change: Treat file_path versus path as a schema-dialect mismatch. Either make file_path a formally valid alias in the JSON schema, rename read.path to file_path after cross-model evidence, or remove the advertised alias from the schema description.
